Class GameEngine

java.lang.Object
core.GameEngine
public class GameEngine extends Object
The core engine of the Kuroshiro game, responsible for managing the central game state. This includes turn progression, move validation, ability cooldowns, specialized combat actions (shooting/stabbing), and Pawn-style promotions.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameEngine(Board board)
    Initializes a new GameEngine with the specified board configuration.

    Method

    Returns the color of the piece currently awaiting promotion.

    Returns the board coordinate where the promotion is taking place.

    Retrieves all legal movement destinations for a specific piece on the current board layout.

    Returns the total number of actions (moves, stabs, shoots) executed in the match.

    Checks if the engine is currently halted, waiting for a player to select a promotion upgrade.

    Attempts to perform a standard non-combat movement for a piece.

    Executes the promotion process, replacing the original piece with the selected upgrade.

    Immediately ends the game and declares the opponent as the winner.
    MoveResult

    Executes a ranged attack if the acting piece implements Shootable.

    Executes a melee action if the acting piece implements Stabbable.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • GameEngine

      public GameEngine(Board board)
      Initializes a new GameEngine with the specified board configuration. By default, the game starts with the Color.WHITE player's turn.
      Parameters:
      board - the game board to be managed by this engine instance

  • Method Details

    • makeMove

      public MoveResult makeMove(Position from, Position to)
      Attempts to perform a standard non-combat movement for a piece. Validates turn order, piece ownership, and move legality before executing.
      Parameters:
      from - the starting coordinate of the piece to move
      to - the target destination coordinate
      Returns:
      a MoveResult indicating a successful move, or the specific reason for failure

    • stab

      public MoveResult stab(Position shooterPos, Position target)
      Executes a melee action if the acting piece implements Stabbable. A successful stab instantly captures the target and moves the attacker to the target's square.
      Parameters:
      shooterPos - the current coordinate of the attacking piece
      target - the coordinate of the enemy to stab
      Returns:
      a MoveResult detailing the success or failure of the stab action

    • shoot

      public MoveResult shoot(Position shooterPos, Position target)
      Executes a ranged attack if the acting piece implements Shootable. Unlike moving or stabbing, a successful shoot action damages/captures the target without altering the attacking piece's position on the board.
      Parameters:
      shooterPos - the current coordinate of the shooting piece
      target - the coordinate of the target being shot at
      Returns:
      a MoveResult detailing the outcome of the attack

    • getSafeMoves

      public List<Position> getSafeMoves(Piece piece)
      Retrieves all legal movement destinations for a specific piece on the current board layout.
      Parameters:
      piece - the piece to evaluate
      Returns:
      a list of safe, valid Position coordinates

    • getCurrentTurn

      public Color getCurrentTurn()
      Returns the color of the player whose turn it currently is.
      Returns:
      the active turn's Color

    • isGameOver

      public boolean isGameOver()
      Evaluates if the game has reached an end state.
      Returns:
      true if the game has concluded, false if it is ongoing

    • getWinner

      public Color getWinner()
      Returns the player who won the game.
      Returns:
      the winning Color, or null if the match is unresolved

    • getBoard

      public Board getBoard()
      Provides direct access to the current state of the game board.
      Returns:
      the active Board instance

    • getTotalMoves

      public int getTotalMoves()
      Returns the total number of actions (moves, stabs, shoots) executed in the match.
      Returns:
      the aggregate move count

    • isPromotionPending

      public boolean isPromotionPending()
      Checks if the engine is currently halted, waiting for a player to select a promotion upgrade.
      Returns:
      true if a promotion is pending

    • getPromotionColor

      public Color getPromotionColor()
      Returns the color of the piece currently awaiting promotion.
      Returns:
      the promoting piece's Color

    • getPromotionPosition

      public Position getPromotionPosition()
      Returns the board coordinate where the promotion is taking place.
      Returns:
      the Position of the pending promotion

    • promote

      public void promote(Piece promoted)
      Executes the promotion process, replacing the original piece with the selected upgrade. Upon completion, it resumes standard end-of-turn logic and passes the turn.
      Parameters:
      promoted - the newly instantiated piece chosen by the player

    • resign

      public void resign()
      Immediately ends the game and declares the opponent as the winner.
